caption: The video shows a close-up view of a car's dashboard, focusing on the instrument cluster and the ignition area. The dashboard displays various gauges, including the speedometer, tachometer, fuel gauge, and temperature gauge. The "Unleaded Fuel Only" label is visible above the digital display, which currently shows a speed of zero. The key is inserted into the ignition, and the "Door Ajar" warning light is illuminated in red, indicating that one of the car doors is not fully closed. The camera remains steady, capturing the details of the dashboard and the surrounding interior elements, such as the steering wheel and part of the dashboard panel. The scene suggests that the car is stationary, possibly with the driver preparing to start it or having just turned off the engine.
